    def apply_memory_reconciliation(self, req: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
        agent_id = req.get("agent_id")
        run_id = req.get("run_id")
        replacement_files = req.get("replacement_files")
        expected = f"JOSE_APPROVED_MEMORY_RECONCILIATION:{agent_id}:{run_id}"
        if req.get("approval_token") != expected:
            raise GovernedError("Exact memory-reconciliation approval token is required")
        if not isinstance(agent_id, str) or not re.fullmatch(r"[A-Za-z0-9._-]+", agent_id):
            raise GovernedError("Invalid agent_id")
        if not isinstance(run_id, str) or not re.fullmatch(r"[A-Za-z0-9._-]+", run_id):
            raise GovernedError("Invalid run_id")
        if not isinstance(replacement_files, list) or not replacement_files:
            raise GovernedError("replacement_files is required")
        review_root = self.repo / "memory/memory-reconciliation" / agent_id / run_id
        if not (review_root / "proposal.json").is_file():
            raise GovernedError("Memory reconciliation proposal does not exist")
        paths = []
        for item in replacement_files:
            if not isinstance(item, dict) or not isinstance(item.get("path"), str) or not isinstance(item.get("content"), str):
                raise GovernedError("Each replacement file requires path and content")
            rel, _ = self._safe_rel(item["path"], purpose="context")
            if "memory" not in rel.parts:
                raise GovernedError("Memory reconciliation can only update memory paths")
            paths.append(str(rel))
        with self._lock("apply_memory_reconciliation"):
            backup = self._snapshot_context_paths(f"memory-reconcile-{agent_id}", paths)
            for item in replacement_files:
                rel, live = self._safe_rel(item["path"], purpose="context")
                if "memory" not in rel.parts:
                    raise GovernedError("Memory path escaped")
                atomic_write_text(live, item["content"])
            record = {
                "applied_at": iso_now(),
                "agent_id": agent_id,
                "run_id": run_id,
                "files": paths,
                "backup_directory": str(backup.relative_to(self.repo)),
            }
            atomic_write_json(review_root / "applied.json", record)
            result = {"ok": True, "summary": "Approved memory reconciliation applied", **record}
            self._audit("apply_memory_reconciliation", req, result)
            return result

    def _snapshot_context_paths(self, label: str, paths: list[str]) -> Path:
        backup = self.backup_root / f"{label}-{utc_stamp()}-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}"
        files_root = backup / "files"
        manifest = []
        for raw in paths:
            rel, live = self._safe_rel(raw, purpose="context")
            entry = {"path": str(rel), "exists": live.is_file()}
            if live.is_file():
                dest = files_root / rel
                dest.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
                shutil.copy2(live, dest)
                entry.update({"sha256": sha256_file(live), "size": live.stat().st_size})
            manifest.append(entry)
        backup.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        atomic_write_json(backup / "manifest.json", {"created_at": iso_now(), "files": manifest})
        return backup


def build_executor_actions(repo: Path | None = None) -> dict[str, Callable[[dict[str, Any]], dict[str, Any]]]:
    executor = GovernedExecutor(repo or DEFAULT_REPO)

    def wrap(name: str, func: Callable[[dict[str, Any]], dict[str, Any]]) -> Callable[[dict[str, Any]], dict[str, Any]]:
        def handler(req: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
            result = func(req)
            result.setdefault("action", name)
            result.setdefault("executor_version", EXECUTOR_VERSION)
            return result
        return handler

    return {
        "governed_executor_status": wrap("governed_executor_status", executor.status),
        "governed_executor_selftest": wrap("governed_executor_selftest", executor.selftest),
        "governed_task_status": wrap("governed_task_status", executor.task_status),
        "governed_preflight": wrap("governed_preflight", executor.preflight),
        "list_registered_tasks": wrap("list_registered_tasks", executor.list_registered_tasks),
        "run_registered_task": wrap("run_registered_task", executor.run_registered_task),
        "checkpoint_repository": wrap("checkpoint_repository", executor.checkpoint_repository),
        "run_governed_phase": wrap("run_governed_phase", executor.start_governed_phase),
        "start_governed_phase": wrap("start_governed_phase", executor.start_governed_phase),
        "author_candidate": wrap("author_candidate", executor.author_candidate),
        "validate_candidate": wrap("validate_candidate", executor.validate_candidate),
        "prepare_candidate_approval": wrap("prepare_candidate_approval", executor.prepare_candidate_approval),
        "install_candidate": wrap("install_candidate", executor.install_candidate),
        "rollback_candidate": wrap("rollback_candidate", executor.rollback_candidate),
        "finalize_phase": wrap("finalize_phase", executor.finalize_phase),
        "commit_installed_candidate": wrap("commit_installed_candidate", executor.commit_installed_candidate),
        "tag_phase_checkpoint": wrap("tag_phase_checkpoint", executor.tag_phase_checkpoint),
        "push_repository": wrap("push_repository", executor.push_repository),
        "prepare_memory_reconciliation": wrap("prepare_memory_reconciliation", executor.prepare_memory_reconciliation),
        "apply_memory_reconciliation": wrap("apply_memory_reconciliation", executor.apply_memory_reconciliation),
    }


def _run_background_governed_phase(workspace_raw: str) -> int:
    executor = GovernedExecutor(DEFAULT_REPO)
    workspace = Path(workspace_raw).resolve()
    try:
        workspace.relative_to(executor.staging_root.resolve())
    except ValueError as exc:
        raise GovernedError("Background workspace escapes governed staging") from exc
    request_path = workspace / "background-request.json"
    if not request_path.is_file():
        raise GovernedError("Background request record is missing")
    request_record = load_json(request_path)

        request_record.get("request"), dict
    ):
        raise GovernedError("Background request record is invalid")
